title: unjoin
description: break a list into separate messages

messages.description: any message whose elements will be separated into groups of elements
the list composed of the joined messages

flags.name: @outsize <float>
flags.description:
number of elements per group
default: 1

body: [unjoin] separates a list's elements by groups of any size (default 1). Each group is sent out a separate outlet, extra elements are sent to an extra outlet.
